runs.text: Traditional slide tools force a straight line

textboxData.richTextHtml: Traditional slide tools force a straight line

• One-size-fits-all linear sequence
  • Hard to reveal detail in context
  • Awkward jump cuts between related ideas
  • Visual style often disconnected from motion

One Canvas

Many Story Paths
Infinite workspace map

runs.text: Slides are camera bookmarks in this shared space. You are not duplicating content.

textboxData.richTextHtml:
Slides are camera bookmarks in this shared space.

You are not duplicating content.

Macro to micro zoom

Drill from system overview to one decision.
Rich text editor

Bold + italic + underline + mixed sizes.

Hierarchy is built visually, not by slide count.

  • Bullets and numbered flow
  • Consistent typography tokens
Shape system and visual styling

runs.text: Shapes can be layered with text and images, then animated by camera movement.

textboxData.richTextHtml:
Shapes can be layered with text and images, then animated by camera movement.

Use roles for foreground, accent, muted, and highlight to stay consistent.
Image support and effects

runs.text: Apply border radius, filters, cropping, and drop shadows while preserving asset quality.

runs.text: Comparison: linear deck vs spatial narrative

textboxData.richTextHtml: Comparison: linear deck vs spatial narrative

Linear Deck

  • Fixed order
  • Context switches
  • Redundant slides

Infiniprez

  • Spatial sequencing
  • Cinematic transitions
  • Single source of truth
